changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): Sports cards no longer extend below the screen — the page now uses Column with weighted children (55% hero, 45% pills+cards) instead of fixed 420dp/350dp absolute positioning. Math: overflow is impossible because every region's height is computed from the actual available space.

Card internals restructured to use absolute alignment (TopStart for status row, Center for scores, BottomCenter for channel chip). Scores are now GUARANTEED dead-center vertically — no more 'creeping toward the bottom' regression. Card height also dropped 220dp → 200dp for extra headroom.
